code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{requestOtp}from"../api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function LoginPage(_ref){let{onOtpRequested}=_ref;const[phone,setPhone]=useState("");const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState("");const submit=async event=>{event.preventDefault();setError("");setLoading(true);try{const data=await requestOtp(phone.trim());onOtpRequested(phone.trim(),data.otp);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}finally{setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Online Fuel Delivery"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Enter your 10-digit mobile number to receive OTP."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:submit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"tel",placeholder:"10-digit phone number",value:phone,onChange:e=>setPhone(e.target.value),maxLength:10,required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",disabled:loading,children:loading?"Sending...":"Send OTP"})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error})]})});}export default LoginPage;
